description: A new hire needs to complete their I-9 and W-4 forms before their first day.

nodes.task_description: Identify the new hire in the HRIS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the new employee's record.

nodes.task_description: Send the new hire a link to the onboarding portal to complete their paperwork electronically.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the welcome email with the portal link.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all forms have been completed and submitted correctly in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the portal and confirms that the I-9 and W-4 are complete.
